body_txt: When a character uses physical Props to disguise themselves. This is a staple of Spy Fiction , where the hero will often use a wig and dress and affect an accent, thus the name of the trope. For impersonating a man, a fake mustache and beard may be used for extra facial concealment, and the dress is usually counterproductive (unless the guy is Disguised in Drag , in which case he won't be wearing the aforementioned phony facial hair). While never as impenetrable a disguise as Latex Perfection , this disguise is usually plausible and may even fool the audience as well as other characters. If it isn't plausible, then it's a Paper-Thin Disguise . Sometimes two young children will do this to pretend to be a tall adult in a trench coat . Compare Coat, Hat, Mask , Disguised in Drag , and Harmless Lady Disguise . See also Clark Kenting for how a disguise can be complemented by mannerisms and behaviors.
